caption: A man and a woman are engaged in a conversation on a stage against a plain light-colored backdrop. The man, wearing a dark navy suit and trousers, stands on the left, while the woman, dressed in a dark blazer over a magenta top and light-colored trousers, stands on the right. Between them are two small white circular tables, each holding a bottle of water and a microphone. Above the scene, a black banner displays the logo and text "mediasite by cornerstone". Throughout the sequence, the woman remains relatively still, gesturing slightly with her hands as she speaks. The man listens attentively; he begins with his hands clasped in front of him, briefly raises his hand to his face in a thoughtful gesture, and then returns to his original posture. The camera remains static, capturing the interaction in a wide shot.
